enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Sottu Sotta Kadhal beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and yearning. Its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create an atmosphere of romance, making it perfect for intimate moments. The song conveys a sense of nostalgia and emotional depth, resonating with anyone who has loved deeply. Overall, it evokes a blend of melancholy and warmth, inviting listeners to reflect on their own experiences of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sottu Sotta Kadhal is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With its soothing lyrics and heartfelt emotions, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the beauty of romance. Dive into the enchanting world of unknown and let the music sweep you off your feet.
stanzaMeanings: Love is like poison, it hurts.
I will give you my heart, just listen to me.
My love's thread can wrap around the earth, coming back twice.
I will give you my heart, just listen to me.
